subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the object of the favoring glance of the Lord of Oneness! When He manifested Himself through His attribute of the All-Merciful, the reality of existence came into the realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منظور نظر عنایت حضرت احدیت چون بصفت رحمانیت تجلی فرمود حقیقت وجود در حیز
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @love of God, @day of Resurrection; Judgement, @spiritual transformation
